hotel_name: Hotel de la Poste – French Quarter, A Renaissance Hotel

reviews.title: Minimal facilities, dirty room, turn down service was absent
I would not book again
reviews.negatives: Stayed there 3 days and room service was horrible with cleaning our room and proving new towels and wash cloths.

reviews.title: Nice Quiet Stay
reviews.positives: location, friendly staff, new furnishings

reviews.title: Lovely hotel
reviews.text: We had a great stay at this hotel. It was well located in the French hotel. We parked our car up for the time we were there. the room was comfortable and funky in style with everything you needed for a comfortable stay. Most things were in walking distance from he hotel. It was close to restaurants.
reviews.positives: Location, Funky room, Friendly staff

reviews.title: Lovely boutique hotel. Nice and quiet.
reviews.text: Highly recommended hotel. Nice and quiet. Boutique hotel with very chic furnshising. We loved it
reviews.positives: Location, quietness and character

reviews.title: Would not stay here again.
reviews.positives: Nice rooms
reviews.negatives: Our balcony was missing a chair.  Ask for one and never received it.  The phone in the room didn’t work and the cleaning staff never came to clean our room.  Not once in our 4 day stay and we were charged a $30 resort fee…for what??

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Very clean cute decor
reviews.negatives:
Paid for a king /balcony
Missed flight (airline at fault) informed hotel and booking.com 
Was.tols i would be fine still charged but I would get my room i paid over 2k for

Once I arrived i had no choice but to stay in a double!!

reviews.title: wouldn’t stay here again
reviews.positives: the location was very nice
reviews.negatives: my fridge dripped the entire time despite asking for someone to come fix it. The pool was very small and there was very little space to sit. I ordered room service and waited almost 2 hours until i called to cancel the order and ordered door dash instead. The fire alarm went off for almost 3 hours in the middle of the night without even an apology from the hotel.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: The staff were not trained properly; they could not explain our bill properly; we had one encounter with a staff member at the front desk who was fairly rude

reviews.title: There won’t be a next time.
reviews.positives: The king room had a balcony that overlooked the pool. The two queen rooms were connected. A/C was solid. Pool was small but nice and not overcrowded. Rooms were clean and well maintained.
reviews.negatives:
Front desk staff were generally unhelpful and didn’t seem to be well suited for their industry. The hot water in one of the rooms literally took 2 to 3 minutes to warm up and the faucets weren’t particularly clear so we thought that we had no hot water. We alerted the front desk twice and they had it checked out but followed up with instructions. When I called down for the third time they didn’t answer, I left the phone ringing and went down to find the front desk guy ignoring the phone. New Orleans has a lot of hot and cold hospitality workers, but hotels should hold their employees to account! I’m available if you want video of the front desk guy ignoring the phone. The same guy told me that the city provided both the hot and cold water and had turned them both off earlier that day. 
The maintenance guy who helped us in the end and the housekeeping crew were always very attentive.

reviews.title: Great location and great staff
reviews.positives: The location is great and the bedrooms were decent. The staff is great and the breakfast is so so good.
reviews.negatives: Bathrooms desperately need a deep clean and the property overall needs a bit of a refresh. Hoping they make the balconies more comfortable and expand the pool area.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The property was beautiful,clean and close to everything.
reviews.negatives: There was not enough storage for clothes, very small closet, no drawers. We had to keep most of our clothes in the luggage the whole time. There needs to be hooks to hang towels up.

reviews.title: Lovely courtyard, good service, and great location.
reviews.positives: Location, service (valet, restaurant), and courtyard.
reviews.negatives: Property recently transferred ownership. Maintenance issues in corridor ( leaking ceiling ). Our room was not updated and needed a deep cleaning.

reviews.title: Beautiful location in the heart of the French Quarter.
reviews.positives:
The staff were exceptional. Check-in and check-out were easy. 
The courtyard is beautiful. Location is incredible - you're in the heart of the french quarter and everything a tourist could want to see is just steps away!
reviews.negatives:
We were surprised at how small the bathroom sink was (almost no counter space, and no soap for the room). 
Housekeeping service was limited (to save energy and to save money, I'm sure), so our room was only tidied once during our four night stay. This wasn't necessarily an issue, and we COULD have called the front desk to request it daily, but it did feel silly to make the guests have to ask for housekeeping for the price of the stay.

It was also outrageously inconvenient that wifi was only available if you paid for it.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel in a great location.
reviews.positives: I used to live in NOLA and this hotel was lovely.  Not great, not earthshattering, but more than fine.  The room was huge, the bed was comfortable and it was all very clean with no smell.  The service was pleasant.  I would stay here again.  Personal preference, but I prefer a more historic setting.
reviews.negatives: Nothing - all was fine :)

reviews.title: Clean, great location and friendly staff!
reviews.positives: Super close to everything in the French quarter! Staff was friendly! Great little perks like happy hours and lovely courtyard!
reviews.negatives: I wish I knew about the destination fee of $35/night before booking.

reviews.title: Staff was wonderful.will return
reviews.positives:
Clean 
Location
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Staff was excellent
reviews.positives: Close to everything.  Pool could be cleaner.
reviews.negatives: Very posh

reviews.title: It was a very comfortable, pleasant stay.
reviews.positives: It was clean and decorated nicely.

reviews.title: Location is unbeatable! Staff is helpful..Rooms are spacious and nicely designed.
reviews.positives: Location, rooms and fast room service and valet!
reviews.negatives: Bathrooms weren’t my fav but still good

reviews.title: Great service at the front desk
reviews.positives: Beautiful room

reviews.title: Helpful staff and congenial service
reviews.positives:
Great location
Somehow quiet in our room during Mardi Gras

reviews.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Breakfast
reviews.negatives: Omelet &’potatoes

reviews.title: Excellent stay.
reviews.positives: Clean, modern and beautiful. Lovely courtyard. Excellent location. Enjoyed the 15 dollar credit per day for food and drink. Great that you can cast to the TVs. Comfortable beds.

reviews.title: Enjoyed my weekend.  Thank you.
reviews.positives: Location is great.  Hotel was comfortable.  Staff was very friendly to me.

reviews.title: A gorgeous location tucked away in the heartbeat of the beautiful city.
reviews.positives: The entryway is absolutely stunning in person! Everything about this place is just gorgeous from the courtyard, the room, the hallways , even the elevator! Also, you know the saying, location, location, location? Well that saying was created for this exact  space!
reviews.negatives: They only service the room every 3 days unless you special request.

reviews.title: The staff were very pleasant and helpful. The room was clean and comfortable and the location was great! Thank you
reviews.positives: Accessibility and it was well maintained. The courtyard was lovely

reviews.title: We enjoyed the location, ambience and staff.
reviews.positives: The location , restaurant and valet service were wonderful. A glass of champagne at check in helped too.
reviews.negatives: We got locked in the pool. Not cool. The bathroom needs an exhaust system, or scrape and paint them every month.

reviews.title: I would definitely stay at this location again.
reviews.positives: The location was perfect.  Close enough to walk where the action is and far enough to get a good night sleep.  I stayed on the 2nd floor with direct access to the  courtyard which was quaint and quiet. The restaurant food was great.  The Beignets were the best.  The staff were friendly and helpful. I was there with family for 6 nights, we did not regret a moment of it.
reviews.negatives: The coffee should have stayed out until 12 PM for the late risers.  I did not prefer going outdoors to get to my room; however, I made it worthwhile many times by taking the scenic route thru the courtyard.

reviews.title: Great place for a New Orleans experience.
reviews.positives: Great location in the French Quarter, close to everything .  The staff were very friendly, from reception to dining.  They could not have been more welcoming.

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.positives: The look the quality very nice hotel
reviews.negatives: The smell in one of the rooms

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.positives: Location was great for waking
reviews.negatives: The hotel was great but the area was a little noisy for clean up every morning for road sweeping and trash pickup. Notice against the hotel just part of being in this district

reviews.title: Romantic and Quaint
reviews.positives: Staff went above and beyond. Was personally escorted to room with complimentary champagne. Very quiet room and great walking location to all popular tourist areas.
reviews.negatives: n/a

reviews.title: Will stay here again
reviews.positives: Great location and nice staff

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: The building is a bit old, our windows is kinda broken and they are short staff when it comes to cleaning and room services.

reviews.title: A Nice stay with nice location
reviews.positives: Staff was exceptional. Everything this place had to offer was pleasant.
reviews.negatives: One of the empty glass bottles ment for water had old water from previous guest. We didn't use the bottle due to this. Ended up going to Walgreens and getting a water bottle from them.

reviews.title: We would recommend to all.
reviews.positives: This hotel was wonderful! We had a Beautiful room. Very clean and comfortable. Staff were very friendly. We will definitely stay here again.
reviews.negatives: There was nothing we did not like.

reviews.title: Do yourself a favor, book here if you want to stay in the French Quarter.
reviews.positives: A little escape within the French Quarter. The property is tastefully decorated with spa waters and fresh flowers throughout the property, pleasant staff, a pool for mid day swimming, and restaurant to enjoy people watching or room service.
reviews.negatives: Booking.com did not include resort fee in quote. The hotel was perfect!

reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Early check out time

reviews.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Staff, food was very good

reviews.title: Perfect place to enjoy the French quarter
reviews.positives: The location is great, the staff is amazing, food was superb
reviews.negatives: Well, it's not on the cheaper side but all in all it's good value

reviews.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Everything

reviews.title: We had a wonderful stay! Absolutely love NOLA!
reviews.positives: The room was modern and comfortable. The hotel was very quiet. We never heard other guests. The location in the French Quarter was perfect for walking everywhere.
reviews.negatives:
We told them it was our 35th wedding anniversary and our first time in New Orleans. It would have been nice if they had acknowledged that in some way, like a room upgrade, bottle of champagne, etc. 

Also, we had to ask more than halfway through our stay for our room to be freshened up.

reviews.title: Great home base for French Quarter visit.
reviews.positives:
There is a destination fee at all of the New Orleans hotels.  Effectively this gives you daily use-it-or-lose-it credits for the hotel restaurant and/or bar.  This was the first time I had this fully explained to me at a check-in!  The restaurant at the hotel was quite good and it was a positive part of the experience.

The folks at the front desk responded promptly to a couple of room needs.

The location is at the western end of the Quarter and is within easy walking distance to the riverfront, Canal Street transportation, Jackson Square, and the rest of the Quarter.  We took cars from the airport and walked everywhere else during our stay here.  

The rooms are modern and fresh while the hotel still fits in with the Quarter.  It's a nice balance.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: staff was fabulous, location in the middle of the tourist area

reviews.title: Loved ! I hope to come back soon! Great Location!
reviews.positives: Great location and cute, comfortable hotel!! Very cute!
reviews.negatives: I just wished the elevator had AC. It was hot! All other areas were really comfortable and cute.

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.positives: The friendly staff, the room upgrade to a balcony suite, location to everything and the cleanliness of the entire facility.
reviews.negatives: The TV was out the entire night and day of our one night stay, due to the company upgrading the system. The breakfast was not great. The grits were hard and lumpy, the toast was hard and smoke sausage instead of breakfast sausage was served. I was glade it was included with my room. Otherwise this would've really been a even bigger disappointment. Our room came with a wet bar. The refrigerator was fully stocked, but there wasn't any space to put personal drinks or leftover food from eating out. Windows are not noise(double pan) proof. You hear all the street noise. Also the stairs door outside our room could use a door spring that prevents it from slamming shut (very loudly) each time anyone uses it

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Pillows were terrible

reviews.title: This was a fantastic hidden gem right in the middle of the French Quarter
reviews.positives: My daughter and I definitely like how cool and eclectic the hotel was, from the cool lights in the drive area and the look of the reception area when you walked in. Our room was super cool with the neat paintings covering one side of the room over the beds/ The hallways were very cool as well and all the staff was super nice and friendly.
reviews.negatives: Really couldn't find anything that we didn't like, unless you count the drinks at the bar stopping around 10 pm, but that's really only minor. The only other thing would be clean the bird droppings off the couches up on the higher level.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: I love the vibe and the staff.
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like how compact the bathroom was and how expensive it was for a slightly dated room.
